title: malva parviflora var. velutina
intro: Malva parviflora var. velutina, also known as the Velvet Mallow, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, characterized by its soft, velvety leaves and small, white flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Velvet Mallow include soothing digestive issues, reducing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory problems. Velvet Mallow is commonly prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and can also be used as a topical application in the form of a salve or ointment.
